title: Lamb Korma Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired curry made with lamb, spices, and creamy yogurt. Serve over basmati rice or with naan bread for a delicious and satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Lamb
ingredients.amount: 1 pound boneless leg of lamb, cut into 1 1/2-inch cubes

instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
3. Remove lamb from pot and set aside.
4. Add korma spice blend to pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Add yogurt, ginger, garlic, and lemon juice to pot. Stir to combine.
6. Return lamb to pot and bring to a simmer.
7. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook, covered, until lamb is tender, about 1 1/2 hours.
8. Serve lamb and sauce over basmati rice.
9. Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
